name: MACRODYSTROPHIA LIPOMATOSA
definition: rare nonhereditary congenital form of localized gigantism = neural fibrolipoma with

demographics.Path: striking increase in adipose tissue in a fine fibrous network involving periosteum, bone

dominant_finding: long + broad splayed phalanges with endosteal + periosteal bone deposition
distribution: long + broad splayed phalanges with endosteal + periosteal bone deposition
discriminating_features: long + broad splayed phalanges with endosteal + periosteal bone deposition
overgrowth of soft tissue, greatest at volar + distal aspects

general: long + broad splayed phalanges with endosteal + periosteal bone deposition
overgrowth of soft tissue, greatest at volar + distal aspects

clinical.Prognosis: accelerated maturation possible; growth stops at puberty
